title: Implement research verify mock-only verification suite
problem: research verify is a placeholder returning not_implemented. Operators and AGENTS.md expect a single command that runs golden tests, pytest, safety audit, and public-site build in mock mode.
acceptance_criteria: research verify runs mock-only golden, pytest, safety audit, and npm build.
Exits 0 on pass, 1 on failure; emits machine-readable JSON.
Does not require clean git tree or Ollama.
non_goals: Do not duplicate operator loop plan/execute-safe queue logic.
rollback_plan: Revert verify_runner and restore verify placeholder.
